title: Community mourns the passing of Colleen Buckle
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The Graaff-Reinet community is mourning the loss of Colleen Buckle (14 January 1954 - 4 November 2025), who for more than 17 years was a dedicated and much-loved part of Camdeboo Hospice.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The Graaff-Reinet community is mourning the loss of Colleen Buckle (14 January 1954 - 4 November 2025), who for more than 17 years was a dedicated and much-loved part of Camdeboo Hospice."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Colleen and her husband, Clive Buckle, moved to Graaff-Reinet many years ago with their three young children, seeking the town’s dry climate to aid the health of one of them."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Clive established TAC Electrical, while Colleen soon found her purpose through community service.","html":"Clive established TAC Electrical, while Colleen soon found her purpose through community service."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She began volunteering at Camdeboo Hospice in 2004, quickly becoming an integral member of the team.","html":"She began volunteering at Camdeboo Hospice in 2004, quickly becoming an integral member of the team."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Her dedication led to a permanent position as administrative assistant, fundraiser, and manager of the Hospice’s popular bric-a-brac and book outlet.","html":"Her dedication led to a permanent position as administrative assistant, fundraiser, and manager of the Hospice’s popular bric-a-brac and book outlet."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Known for her infectious laugh and creative energy, Colleen’s presence brightened every project she undertook.","html":"Known for her infectious laugh and creative energy, Colleen’s presence brightened every project she undertook."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Colleen was a gem - her creativity and enthusiasm for fundraising were unmatched. From knit-a-thons to silent auctions, she always had fresh ideas,” recalled Gerald Buisman, president of the Graaff-Reinet Lions Club, who worked closely with her over the years.","html":"“Colleen was a gem - her creativity and enthusiasm for fundraising were unmatched. From knit-a-thons to silent auctions, she always had fresh ideas,” recalled Gerald Buisman, president of the Graaff-Reinet Lions Club, who worked closely with her over the years."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"After retiring in 2021 due to ill health, Colleen moved to Edenhof, where she spent her later years surrounded by care and friendship.","html":"After retiring in 2021 due to ill health, Colleen moved to Edenhof, where she spent her later years surrounded by care and friendship."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Martie Bekker, manager at Edenhof, described her as “a real lady whose life was guided by Christ. She was cheerful, loving, and a true survivor who inspired everyone around her”.","html":"Martie Bekker, manager at Edenhof, described her as “a real lady whose life was guided by Christ. She was cheerful, loving, and a true survivor who inspired everyone around her”."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Colleen was eagerly looking forward to celebrating her 72nd birthday in January 2026. “Her life has been a blessing to many,” Bekker said.","html":"Colleen was eagerly looking forward to celebrating her 72nd birthday in January 2026. “Her life has been a blessing to many,” Bekker said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A celebration of Colleen’s life will take place on Saturday 15 November at 10:00 at the Freedom Church in Graaff-Reinet.","html":"A celebration of Colleen’s life will take place on Saturday 15 November at 10:00 at the Freedom Church in Graaff-Reinet."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"May her gentle spirit and joyful laughter continue to inspire those whose lives she touched.","html":"May her gentle spirit and joyful laughter continue to inspire those whose lives she touched."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Community mourns the passing of Colleen Buckle
